name: Ice Cream Pizza Bobslead Brownie
recipeInstructions:
1. Use chunky style ice cream if possible; otherwise, use soft serve.
2. Blend bits of topping into the ice cream until creamy.
3. Spread the mixture on the crust.
4. Top with condiments and drizzle with additional toppings.
5. Refreeze before serving.
6. Serve a Brownie crust topped with chocolate chip ice cream mixed with brownie chunks and chopped walnuts, drizzled with fudge sauce and marshmallow sauce.
